basic_details.job_title: Solapur Science Centre Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Mentor and Technician Posts
basic_details.short_information: Solapur Science Centre Chief Mentor and Technician (Electrical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website solapursciencecentre.org. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Solapur Science Centre Chief Mentor and Technician (Electrical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Technician: 40 years (open), 45 years (reserved). Chief Mentor: No age limit.
age_limit.details: Technician: 40 years (open category), 45 years (reserved category). Chief Mentor: No age limit specified.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Science or B.E. (First Class) with 3 years experience, SSC with ITI Electrical certificate and 1-2 years experience
qualification.details: Chief Mentor: Postgraduate degree in science or Bachelor’s degree in engineering (both in First Class) with 3 years experience in research, teaching or innovation industry. PhD/M.Tech is an added advantage. Passion for innovative projects and work with students. Technician (Electrical): SSC/Matriculation with ITI certificate in electrical trade (1-2 years experience required). Passion for innovative projects and work with students.

salary_details.details: Chief Mentor: ₹25000/- per month Technician (Electrical): ₹14000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Solapur Science Centre Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Solapur Science Centre to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Solapur Science Centre Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Solapur Science Centre Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Solapur Science Centre Job 2026 Notification PDF

Solapur Science Centre Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Chief Mentor: Postgraduate degree in science or Bachelor’s degree in engineering (both in First Class) with 3 years experience in research, teaching or innovation industry. PhD/M.Tech is an added advantage. Passion for innovative projects and work with students. Technician (Electrical): SSC/Matriculation with ITI certificate in electrical trade (1-2 years experience required). Passion for innovative projects and work with students.

content_sections.heading: Solapur Science Centre Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Solapur Science Centre Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Solapur Science Centre Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Solapur Science Centre to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Solapur Science Centre Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Solapur Science Centre Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Solapur Science Centre Recruitment 2026 is 15th July 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Chief Mentor and Technician (Electrical) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Chief Mentor and Technician (Electrical) positions at the Solapur Science Centre for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Mentor post?
faq.answer: For the Chief Mentor position, candidates need a Postgraduate degree in science or a Bachelor’s degree in engineering (both in First Class) with 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What are the age limit criteria for the Technician (Electrical) post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Technician (Electrical) post is 40 years for the open category and 45 years for reserved categories. There is no age limit for the Chief Mentor post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Solapur Science Centre recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 200/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 100/- for SC/ST candidates. This fee is payable online.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Chief Mentor post is ₹25000/- per month, and for the Technician (Electrical) post, it is ₹14000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment for the Chief Mentor and Technician (Electrical) posts at Solapur Science Centre is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Solapur Science Centre Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the 'Apply Online' link provided in the 'Important Links' section. Ensure you fill out the application form accurately before the last date.
